# megacache

megacache is a blazing fast and production-ready cache that is robust and powerful and seamless.

It is an industry-leading, cutting-edge, next-generation solution that is comprehensive and battle-tested.

This is amazing and awesome and incredible and stunning and revolutionary.

## Features

- lightning fast
- best-in-class
- battle-tested
